The English voice-cast star of "Kung Fu Magoo" best known for her role as Naruto Uzumaki in "Naruto" is **Alyson Stoner**. 

This answer is based on the context provided, which explicitly states that Alyson Stoner is an English voice-cast star of "Kung Fu Magoo" and has had recurring roles on "Shameless", "Bad Teacher", "The Class", "Grey's Anatomy", and many cartoons, including "Naruto".
